artPrompt: A widescreen noir film-still of a stocky goblin rogue in a rumpled overcoat clutching a sinister leather briefcase to his chest in a rain-slick alley after dark, an unnatural seam of light leaking from the case's edges across his greedy grin; a single amber lamp pools warm glow through cigar smoke and drizzle, ink-black shadows swallowing the brick behind him, intimate criminal menace, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Bagman with the Good Briefcase
text: Whenever you sacrifice a Favor token, you may pay {1}. If you do, create a Treasure token. He skims a little off every collection. He calls it "the briefcase fee."
flavorText: Nobody knows what's in the good briefcase. Nobody who's looked has been heard from since.
